_readme: 타임스탬프 whisper 단어 실측 (파이프라인 v6 기본)
title: Don't let it get to you
expression: Don't let it get to you

sentences.en: ★ Don't let it get to you, Woody.
Let what? I don't... What do you mean? Who?
sentences.ko: 뭘 담아둬? 난... 무슨 소리야? 누가?

sentences.en: I know Andy's excited about Buzz. But you know he'll always have a special place for you.
sentences.ko: 앤디가 버즈 때문에 신난 건 알아. 그래도 네 자리는 늘 특별하다는 거 알잖아.
